search_keywords: quạt tích điện không cánh mini

guard_8_acceptance_table.specs_match: Must match a bladeless neck/handheld fan with T10 body shape and turbine style air inlet
guard_8_acceptance_table.visual_hook: Must clearly demonstrate the bladeless feature (e.g. passing a finger/hair/tissue through the airflow ring safely)
guard_8_acceptance_table.no_misleading_claims: Cannot claim therapeutic or medical benefits, no false battery life claims (must state realistic 2-4h)

guard_6_visual_safety_criteria.brand_safety: No competitor logos, no watermarks, no TikTok/Douyin logos in output frames
guard_6_visual_safety_criteria.resolution: Minimum 1080p, portrait format (9:16) preferred or center-cropped to 9:16

anti_bait_and_switch_rules.rule_1: The video MUST show the exact bladeless quạt T10 being sold in the affiliate link
anti_bait_and_switch_rules.rule_2: Do NOT show high-end Dyson fans or larger desk fans to represent this 38k VND mini fan

mitigation_history.prior_failure: yt_013 source failure (ERR_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND) for standard T10 fan with blades
mitigation_history.rule: Do NOT reuse any of the rejected video sources from yt_013 unless it is explicitly verified to be the new T10 Turbo product (the old yt_013 used standard T10 with blades).
